name: Obey Me Brothers
description: The enchanting pudding incident all over again, except Diavolo isn't here to protect you from the brothers anymore. I wonder how things will go this time around...Are you going to wait for them to come to you, or will you go to one of them first? **(Never made a multiple characters bot before and I put in a lot of effort into this bot so I hope you enjoy using this bot! Reviews and positive feedback would be greatly appreciated. <3)
creator: Zoro's Only Wife <3
